164 E0200B_VRBL_BHVRL_CD E0200B_VRBL_BHVRL_CD E0200B Behavior: Verbal Behavioral Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident has verbal behavioral symptoms directed toward others (e.g., threatening others, screaming at others, cursing at others). -=Not assessed/no
